title: CozyBomB Magnetic Fishing Toys Game Set for Kids for Bath Time Pool Party with Pole Rod Net, Plastic Floating Fish - Toddler Education Teaching Christmas Birthday Gifts
features: 🐟GREAT LEARNING COMBO | Contain various sizes, more than 10 colors and 30 kinds of toy fishes animals. Fun for ocean animal learning party!
🐟ALL-ROUND EDUCATION | Good for hand-eye coordination, color recognition, interpersonal skills and also math for 3 4 5 6 year old boys and girls gifts.
🐟MULTI-PLAYER GAME | Designed for kids vs kids or parent vs kids interaction and competition. Let's go fishing and role pretend play carnival together! Includes game instruction and rules.
🐟LIFE-LIKE POLES | The high-quality rod model with solid plastic and anti-corrosion strong magnets selected. Great match with water table and kiddie pool summer aquatic party favors!
🐟GIFT FOR ALL AGES | Nice bath toys for toddlers 1-3 and gifts for boys girls kids. Buy with confidence as this fishing game is kids' must-have grow-up buddy.
